title: Intensity Of Being
definition: The emphasis on the quality and concentration of experience over the length of existence.

difficulty_levels.beginner: Instead of focusing on how long we live, consider how fully we live in each moment.
difficulty_levels.intermediate: The importance given to the intensity and quality of experience rather than the duration of life.
difficulty_levels.expert: A philosophical perspective that values the concentrated, vivid nature of experiences over their length, challenging the conventional notion of a meaningful life.

extra_fields.insight: The realization that a brief, intense life can be more valuable than a long one lived without purpose.
